---
title: "Michael Cusack-Nelkin"
subtitle: "Master's Student | Mathematics of Finance | Columbia University"
about:
  template: solana
  image: profile.jpg
  links:
    - icon: google
      text: Email
      href: mailto:mc5882@columbia.edu
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/michael-cusack-nelkin/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/MichaelCusackNelkin?tab=repositories
---
### about me
I am a master's student in the [Mathematics of Finance (MAFN)](https://www.math.columbia.edu/mafn/) program at [Columbia University](https://www.columbia.edu/). Prior to joining Columbia, I worked at Deloitte Consulting LLP for three years. My research focuses on constructing **optimal equity portfolios** using return forecasts, covariance and volatility estimates, and trading cost models. My favorite things to do outside of research are to read *The Lord of the Rings*, solve problems on [Project Euler](https://projecteuler.net/), boulder, and hangout with my wife and puppy.
